runtimeProbe.source: Capacitor/Console from the freshly installed physical-device build

notes: The visible sentinel was authored through the Grapes editor UI and exported through its validated-project action.
The explicit immutable publication was applied to the selected DOM/CSS projection before the native build.
All seven captures were collected from the installed Capacitor app on the connected physical Android device.
A fresh post-hardening native install emitted the matching publication and projection identities through the runtime probe; its raw device log is retained beside this record.
No trusted visual references were configured, so verify-device reports exploratory no-reference results rather than a fidelity verdict.
